mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alerts (id, elder_id, device_id, type, status, reason, suggested_action, occurred_at, acknowledged_at, resolved_at, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{elderId}, #{deviceId}, #{type}, #{status}, #{reason}, #{suggestedAction}, #{occurredAt}, #{acknowledgedAt}, #{resolvedAt}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE alerts SET type = #{type}, status = #{status}, reason = #{reason}, suggested_action = #{suggestedAction}, occurred_at = #{occurredAt}, acknowledged_at = #{acknowledgedAt}, resolved_at = #{resolvedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
